ground_truth.title: Graphic Design Courses - Conejo Valley Adult Education
ground_truth.main_content:
Graphic Design Courses offered by Conejo Valley Adult Education:

Adobe Photoshop Elements: In-person course where you love your photos! Learn to use Photoshop Elements to show them off! Fix your photos, add artistic effects, and even combine images with Photoshop Elements! Note: Digital Photo Basics, Computer Basics, or some basic computer skills required.

Video Basics & Creation for Beginners: Take your photographs and video footage from your phone, digital camera, or printed stills and compose these into memorable video presentations. Learn the terminology, best practices, and tips from an experienced instructor using free software for Windows, Mac OSX, Linux, and Google Chrome based computers! You will also learn how to create, edit and use your own voice to narrate the videos that you compose with free available software tools. From weddings, family, travel, business, and adventure, all of us have memories captured in photos and videos. Learn how to make these come alive in a remarkable presentation!

Adobe Premiere Pro Level 1: In-person course. Adobe Premiere Pro is a video editing application that is utilized by everyone from YouTube to cable news networks to Academy Award-nominated blockbusters. Students must have a basic understanding of computers. It would be advantageous if you had some prior familiarity with Adobe software, but it is not needed. Learn to navigate the interface, create custom workspaces, develop dynamic title sequences, add, move, trim, and edit video and audio clips, and create a cuts-simple video.

Adobe Premiere Pro Level 2: In-person course. Build on Level 1 skills to employ movement results to scale, rotate, and reposition clips. Assemble a video using storyboard edits, dramatize clips using subtle and stylize video transitions, explain the export alternatives, and use high-speed editing strategies to optimize workflow.

Adobe Premiere Pro Level 3: In-person course. Advanced skills including transform and animate footage, enhance audio tracks, use superior video effects, color correction and color grading, innovative compositing techniques, create lower thirds overlay and closed captioning, and manage assets in huge projects.

Adobe Premiere Pro Certificate Program: In-person comprehensive program. Participants will start from scratch in Premiere Pro. Learn to import clips from diverse sources and incorporate content from other Adobe tools such as Illustrator and Photoshop. Arrange video, image, and audio assets before using Premiere Pro's features to harness and integrate these raw resources into a video sequence by cutting clips, adding audio, and generating stylistic transitions. Advanced editing techniques incorporating motion effects will be explored. Editing multi-camera video shoots, producing title sequences, and distributing completed videos for diverse purposes and platforms are among the other topics covered.

Adobe Lightroom Classic: In-person cloud-based program giving you all the tools to create, edit and organize your photos. Allows you the capability of editing hundreds of photos simultaneously. Learn importing/exporting photos, setting up collections, editing photos in jpeg or Raw, practical editing skills for specific looks including exposure and white balance, exporting for social media and websites, and Adobe Dynamic link between Photoshop and Lightroom. Call to add Adobe Bridge for FREE!

Adobe Bridge: In-person course. Learn to navigate and use reading file structure, reviewing content, choosing pixel rate, metadata, export settings, rating selection of film strip, and set up file paths for your photos.

Adobe Photoshop: In-person course. Pictures provide any report, presentation, or internet site a professional edge, and Photoshop is the industry standard for working with virtual images. You will discover how to create and edit your own virtual portraits and photographs. This hands-on course discusses image formats, color correction, retouching digital photos, working with layers, advanced selection techniques, and using diverse enhancing tools. Learn short restoration strategies and how to prepare for both print and web output.
with: You love your photos! Learn to use Photoshop Elements to show them off! Fix your photos, add artistic effects, and even combine images with Photoshop Elements!
Take your photographs and video footage from your phone, digital camera, or printed stills and compose these into memorable video presentations.
